name: chest_001.png
impression: No acute cardiopulmonary abnormality. Age indeterminate mild anterior wedge compression deformity of an upper lumbar vertebral body.

name: chest_002.png
impression: Mild enlargement of the cardiac silhouette without overt pulmonary edema.

name: chest_003.png
impression: New small loculated pleural effusion within the major fissure of the right lung.

name: chest_004.png
impression: Subsegmental atelectasis in the lung bases. Otherwise no acute cardiopulmonary abnormality.

name: chest_005.png
impression: Left basilar pneumonia. Followup radiographs after treatment are recommended to ensure resolution of this finding.

name: chest_006.png
impression: Faint multifocal opacities in the lungs bilaterally may be secondary to aspiration. Continued close interval follow up is recommended.

name: chest_007.png
impression: Significant interval decrease in bilateral pleural effusions with possible only trace right pleural effusion remaining. Right base atelectasis.

name: chest_008.png
impression: Retrocardiac opacity worrisome for a left lower lobe infectious process.

name: chest_009.png
impression: Mild pulmonary edema, improved since prior imaging.

name: chest_010.png
impression: No acute cardiopulmonary process. Left humerus fracture, better assessed on dedicated radiographs.
